frontpage.existing_seo: ASR Outdoors full catalog of gold panning kits, gold prospecting equipment and rock hounding gear, all in one place.
frontpage.existing_body: Explore the complete range of ASR Outdoor products, designed for adventure, exploration, and preparedness. Our collection includes everything from professional-grade gold panning kits and gold prospecting equipment to durable survival and camping gear, as well as specialized rock hounding tools and field accessories. Whether you’re a prospector, outdoor enthusiast, or hobbyist, ASR Outdoor delivers reliable, performance-driven products built for the field. Browse our full product line to find gear that supports your next adventure with quality, value, and innovation.

gold-panning-kits.existing_body: This collection includes a curated selection of complete gold panning kits designed for beginners and experienced prospectors alike. Each kit typically includes gold pans, classifiers, snuffer bottles, vials, tweezers, and other essential accessories for effective gold recovery. Ideal for hobbyists, outdoor adventurers, and those new to gold prospecting. Kits are suited for use in rivers, streams, and creeks, and are optimized for portability and ease of use.

sifters-or-classifiers.existing_body: Improve your gold recovery process with ASR Outdoor’s durable classifier screens. Designed to fit standard gold pans and buckets, our classifier screens make it easy to separate larger rocks, gravel, and debris from paydirt, leaving behind finer material for more efficient gold panning. Available in a range of mesh sizes, ASR Outdoor classifier screens are built with heavy-duty wire mesh and sturdy frames to withstand repeated use in the field. Whether you’re prospecting in a stream or working material at camp, our classifier screens are an essential tool for faster, more accurate gold recover…
